news.title: How China and U.S. eased the Middle East oil shock and kept prices from spiking even higher
news.summary: China and the U.S. wield great influence over the world's oil market. They are using it to help plug the supply gap.

news.title: Trump told Xi ‘I don't talk about’ whether U.S. would defend Taiwan from China
news.summary: President Donald Trump spoke about Taiwan after a two-day visit to China. He said he discussed Iran, and trade deals with Chinese President Xi Jingping.

news.title: 30-year Treasury yield tops 5.1%, highest in nearly a year
news.summary: Treasurys spiked on Friday as inflation signals continue to muddy interest rate expectations. New Federal Reserve chair Kevin Warsh continues to muddy expectations.

news.title: Inflation rate projected to hit 6% in the second quarter, top economic forecasters say
news.summary: The recent surge in inflation is likely to get worse over the next several months, according to a survey. The survey was conducted by the National Bureau of Economic Research.

news.title: China will buy more U.S. oil because it is a natural trade partner, says Energy Secretary Wright
news.summary: China relies heavily on crude oil imports from the Middle East. Those supplies are mostly cut off due to Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: 5 tests Kevin Warsh will face as Fed chair
news.summary: Wall Street and Washington will be watching to see how he reacts to political pressure and whether he can get the central bank on board with the major changes he favors.

news.title: You may be making a big mistake with your Roth conversion, this expert says
news.summary: If you have a high IRA or 401(k) balance, you should consider doing this instead. If you are a high-earning person, you may not be able to afford to do this.

news.title: ‘I experienced many years of poverty’: I worked until 70. Why do wealthy retirees look down on those with less savings?
news.summary: “The majority of people are struggling to make ends meet,” he says. “The most of us are just trying to survive.”

news.title: Stocks tumble, bond rout deepens as Trump’s China visit fails to pry open Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: Hopes for an end to the Iran conflict faded after President Trump failed to secure a commitment from China to help pressure Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Powell’s legacy as Fed chair is fighting inflation and Trump. He may lose the battle against both.
news.summary: Jerome Powell will be remembered for how the struggles against inflation and to preserve Federal Reserve independence ultimately end. He will be known as the man who tried to keep the Fed from becoming too big and too powerful.
